notes: Default gravity deck for the Emperor / Dante's office. Pressure beats (the bell rings, a folder is misplaced) plus warm beats (the clerk has it, the precedent lands).

deck.title: the bell rings
deck.flavor: the bell above the front door rings. somebody you weren't expecting.

deck.title: the clerk has it
deck.flavor: before you ask the clerk hands you the folder.

deck.title: the radiator clicks
deck.flavor: the radiator does its small percussive thing. the room steadies.

deck.title: a petitioner changes their mind
deck.flavor: somebody in the anteroom puts on their coat and leaves.

deck.title: the stamp wears thin
deck.flavor: the ink pad needs reinking. you do it at the desk.

deck.title: the clock corrects itself
deck.flavor: the brass desk clock chimes a half-tone off. it has not done that in years.

deck.title: a misfiled folder appears
deck.flavor: in the precedent shelf, a folder that belongs in estate.

deck.title: outside, a small protest
deck.flavor: two voices on the bank, raised. their case is not in this office.

deck.title: a signature doesn't match
deck.flavor: the page in front of you has the petitioner's name in two different hands.

deck.title: the day ticks forward
deck.flavor: you stamp something. the ledger ticks. it's the kind of small ruling that always lands.

deck.title: the clerk corrects you
deck.flavor: she clears her throat. you are at the wrong volume.

deck.title: the office warms through
deck.flavor: the radiator finally gets the corner.

deck.title: the appeals case arrives
deck.flavor: the appellate brief is on the desk. you did not put it there.

deck.title: the clock runs long
deck.flavor: 5:14 PM. the bell rang five minutes ago.

deck.title: the office settles
deck.flavor: everything that needed to be filed is filed. the room agrees.
